title: Passport Subject
description: The physical or digital product that a Digital Product Passport describes. Captures the unique identifier, product class, and optional category or batch metadata. Specializations add domain-specific subject fields via extension.

subjectId.description: Unique identifier of the physical product (serial number, batch ID, or QR-accessible URI)

productClass.description: Product classification code or category for the passport subject

productModel.description: Model or type designation of the product

manufacturerId.description: Identifier of the legal manufacturer (BPN or other)

batchId.description: Batch or lot identifier, if applicable

qrCodeUri.description: URI encoded in the QR code on the physical product that links to this passport
